summary: Recording source unknown with modest sound quality; the show is noted only for a Supplication highlight, yielding mixed overall impressions.
review: The two fan reviews give very limited information. One reviewer points out that "Supplication" was a highlight and seems satisfied enough to award three stars, while the other provides no commentary on performance or audio and assigns a zero‑star rating, suggesting disappointment. With no details on recording source or overall set flow, the consensus is mixed but leans toward lukewarm.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief reviews; one modestly positive (3★) and one essentially negative (0★). No technical details to boost the rating, so overall score is low‑mid with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention any aspects of sound quality, clarity, or mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No commentary on set structure or pacing was provided.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Title "Jerry Was On" suggests his presence, but no specific performance details were given.
